Flu, Tdap, and COVID-19 Vaccination Coverage Among Pregnant Women â United States, April 2024 
Sept. 23, 2024 
At a glance 
To assess flu, Tdap, and COVID-19 vaccination coverage among women pregnant during the 2023–24 flu season, CDC analyzed data from an Internet panel survey conducted during A
